overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck simulator showing a driver navigating a snow-covered multi-lane highway at night during heavy snowfall. The truck approaches, enters, and exits a tunnel while windshield wipers actively clear the windshield, with dashboard instruments and GPS visible throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway at night with active snowfall

events.description: a car overtakes the truck on the left lane, headlights visible through the snow
tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead, illuminated by the truck headlights

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the snowy highway with windshield wipers active, maintaining lane position while approaching the tunnel

notable_agents.action: car overtaking the truck on the left side in the passing lane
truck visible ahead in the distance with taillights glowing

entered.detail: illuminated instrument panel with speedometer and gauges visible at bottom of frame
wipers moving back and forth clearing heavy snow from the windshield
GPS device mounted on dashboard displaying the route map
metal highway guardrail partially covered in snow
metal highway guardrail on the right side of the road
large snow banks piled high alongside the highway
snow-covered embankment on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a snow-covered highway at night with heavy snowfall reducing visibility. Windshield wipers work continuously to clear the snow while the dashboard instruments remain illuminated. Other vehicles occasionally pass by as the truck approaches a tunnel entrance visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel interior with artificial lighting and dry road surface

events.description: truck enters the tunnel from the snowy highway, transitioning from open air to enclosed space
tunnel exit becomes visible ahead with bright light indicating the end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel maintaining steady speed, wipers continue moving though no precipitation inside

notable_agents.action: truck driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: concrete tunnel wall with horizontal lines and lighting fixtures
concrete tunnel wall on the right side with reflective markers
arched concrete ceiling of the tunnel with ventilation and lighting
overhead artificial lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a long highway tunnel, providing shelter from the heavy snow outside. The environment shifts to artificial lighting with dry asphalt road surface. Concrete walls line both sides of the tunnel as the truck follows another vehicle toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered highway continuing after tunnel exit with occasional road signs

events.description: truck exits the tunnel back into the snowy night conditions with heavy snowfall resuming
truck navigates a slight curve to the right as the highway bends

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey on the snowy highway after exiting the tunnel, navigating through curves while maintaining speed

notable_agents.action: large truck passing on the left side with bright headlights

entered.detail: metal highway guardrail reappearing after tunnel exit
metal guardrail on the right side of the highway
snow banks alongside the highway, taller than the guardrails
snow-covered ground on the right side with sparse trees visible
blue highway information sign with white text indicating directions

segments.scene_description: After exiting the tunnel, the truck returns to the harsh winter conditions with heavy snow falling again. The highway continues through a snowy landscape with guardrails and snow banks lining the road. The truck navigates gentle curves while other vehicles occasionally pass by in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a truck navigating a treacherous winter highway that transitions from a blinding snowstorm into a sheltered tunnel before returning to the freezing night. It begins on a snow-covered road where heavy snowfall reduces visibility and windshield wipers work continuously against the elements while illuminated dashboard instruments glow in the dark. As the truck approaches the distance, the scene shifts abruptly from the chaotic storm to the artificial lighting and dry asphalt of a long highway tunnel. The camera then follows the flow of traffic through the concrete corridor before emerging from the exit, where the environment instantly reverts to harsh winter conditions. Finally, the truck navigates gentle curves through a landscape of deep snow banks and guardrails as other vehicles pass by in the falling snow.
